sql_array: CREATE TABLE users (id UInt32, name String, age UInt32) ENGINE=Log;
INSERT INTO users (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30), (2, 'Bob', 25), (3, 'Charlie', NULL);
UPDATE users SET age = 35 WHERE name = 'Bob';
SELECT any(name) AS first_name, any(age) AS first_age FROM users;
SELECT any(name) FROM users WHERE age > 20;
